[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A cartoon character holding a small flower appears in a simple black-and-white style with visible text above and below.

Main Subject:
A simple line-drawn cartoon figure with a white face and black outline stands facing forward, with arched eyes, a small nose-like shape, and an open mouth shape near the bottom center. The figure’s arms are drawn as thin lines; one arm extends to the right holding a small five-petal flower with red petals and a darker red center. A small rectangular hand is drawn at the end of the extended arm, and a simple vertical line extends downward from the body.

Setting:
The background is plain white with no visible environment or scenery.

Visual Details:
The drawing uses bold black outlines and minimal internal details. The face is light/white with black features (eyes and nose area). The flower is colored with red petals and a darker red center, contrasting against the monochrome character. The composition is centered, with the character’s head near the upper middle, the flower to the right side, and the lower text spanning the width near the bottom. The image looks like a flat graphic on a plain background, with no visible shadows or texture.

Visible Text:
pap ataa
kita pacaran

Practical Summary:
The image shows a minimalist cartoon character holding a red flower. Large stylized text appears above and below the character.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
